analysis: same-device ultrasound treatment plus finite-frequency inverse and source-encoded linear RTM monitoring
simulation_type: RITK-loaded CT/NIfTI, kwavers PyO3 theranostic inverse

brain_scene.name: rire_ct_aligned_vim_like_scene

target.name: vim_like_atlas_coordinate_resolved_to_ct_brain_support
target.source_frame: MNI152 2009c atlas coordinate mapped once into CT brain-support fractions

brain_scene.invariant: target_fraction_xyz resolves against the CT-derived brain support on each simulation lattice; transducer coordinates are generated from this single pose block and expressed relative to that target.

controlled_linear_nonlinear_comparison.comparison_contract: linear and nonlinear outputs are physically resampled to the full-resolution controlled CT placement grid before metrics, archived fields, and display

summary.dominant_observation: the matched comparison does not isolate one dominant divergence source

cases.technical_explanation: On the full CT placement grid, linear fusion Dice is 0.760, elastic shear Dice is 0.383, and nonlinear fusion Dice is 0.375. Nonlinear target MI is 21.75 at 17.54 MPa; displayed target-pressure outside energy is 0.000, linear/nonlinear fusion Pearson is 0.525, and nonlinear FWI objective drop is 2.151e-05. The Rayleigh-Plesset source and passive reconstruction hotspots are 2.83 and 21.93 grid cells from the target centroid. The residual projected aperture mismatch from the original runs is 99.51 mm; the nonlinear aperture axis differs from the planned beam axis by 98.39 deg; the displayed target-pressure hotspot offset is -0.47 mm along the planned beam axis and 1.04 mm cross-axis; the treatment-window pressure hotspot offset is -0.47 mm along-axis and 1.04 mm cross-axis; the raw body-pressure hotspot offset is -0.47 mm along-axis and 1.04 mm cross-axis; the raw pressure peak is inside the body with coupling/body peak ratio 0.00, and the body pressure hotspot is 0.71 grid cells from target. the measured electronic-steering calibration hotspot is 0.00 grid cells from the nominal focus and selected correction [0, 0, 0]. therefore the matched artifact localizes the remaining channel difference to nonlinear in-body pressure/cavitation spread, source-region dominance in raw peak-pressure display, and residual 2-D-vs-3-D aperture mismatch, not to image resolution alone.
